title: Bartoline Easipaste® Ready Mixed Wallpaper Adhesive 5kg - High Initial Tack, No Mixing, Suitable for Vinyl, Blown Vinyl, Embossed, Washable & Paste The Wall Wallcoverings
features: NO MIXING OR DILUTION REQUIRED: Bartoline Easipaste is a ready-to-use wallpaper adhesive that requires no mixing or dilution. Its smooth consistency ensures easy application, making it perfect for quick and effortless wallpaper hanging.

PERFECT FOR VARIOUS WALLCOVERINGS: Suitable for all types of wallcoverings, including vinyl, blown vinyl, heavy embossed, washables, and ‘paste the wall’ options. Works with top wallpaper brands like Contour, Coloroll, Terazza, and more, offering a versatile solution for all your wallpapering needs.

HOW TO USE: Open the container, break the seal, and lift the lid. Apply the adhesive evenly to the back of the wallcovering using a brush or roller. For heavy embossed papers, allow the paste to soak before hanging. Wipe off any excess adhesive with a damp sponge.

HIGH INITIAL TACK WITH STRONG FINAL ADHESION: This advanced adhesive provides strong initial grab, making it easy to position your wallpaper. It also ensures powerful final adhesion for a long-lasting, flawless finish that adheres securely to most wall surfaces.

COVERAGE & STORAGE: 1kg of Easipaste is enough to hang approximately one 10-meter roll of standard wallcovering or half a roll of heavy embossed wallpaper. Store the adhesive in a cool, dry place to maintain its effectiveness and avoid exposure to extreme temperatures.
description: Bartoline Easipaste® provides high initial tack with good slip properties and powerful final adhesion. Recommended for use with most wallpaper brands. No mixing or dilution is required.

specifications_table.Material: ‎Adhesive, possibly including components suitable for adhering to vinyl
